name: Salesforce, Inc.
description: Salesforce, Inc. is a global leader in customer relationship management (CRM) technology that brings companies and customers together. The company provides a comprehensive suite of cloud-based applications for sales, service, marketing, and commerce, powered by its integrated platform, Customer 360. Salesforce enables businesses of all sizes to leverage artificial intelligence, data, and automation to deliver personalized experiences and drive digital transformation. Headquartered in San Francisco, the company is a pioneer in the software-as-a-service (SaaS) model and continues to innovate with its AI-driven Agentforce and Data Cloud solutions.
